subcodes.title: Words to two new Baha’ís, spoken on 1913-05-07
subcodes.first_line: Some souls are like unto the glass chimneys. They are pure and transparent but an outside light must come in and illumine them; there are others who are illumined but they do not confer illumination
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از نفوس مانند سراجی هستند که باید آنها را روشن کنند و بعضی خود روشنند ولی دیگران
subcodes.subjects: @high station of teachers of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
